content:
# Spoke Dashboard Integration Design (2026-03-28)

## Key Decision: Enhance AgentsView, not a separate SpokesView
Spokes are agents with extra metadata (container, issue, branch). Enrich existing Agents tab instead of creating a parallel tab. One command center for all agents.

## Backend: 1 new endpoint
- GET /api/dashboard/spokes - returns Docker container metadata for spoke containers (via bollard). Frontend merges with agent registry data by matching agent_id.
- Spoke count added to status endpoint.

## Frontend: Enhance existing components
- AgentCard gets spoke badge + spoke info section (issue, branch, container health)
- SpokesSummaryBar at top of AgentsView (running count + issue pills)
- ContainerStatus component (dual health: Docker container + corvia agent heartbeat)
- Activity feed entries from spokes get spoke badge
- Agent filter on activity feed for per-spoke view
- No new tabs, no new pages, no new navigation concepts

## Dual Health Monitoring
- Docker HEALTHCHECK (pgrep claude) for container-level health
- corvia agent heartbeat for Claude Code activity
- Dashboard shows both: container_state + agent_state

Doc: docs/decisions/2026-03-28-spoke-dashboard-design.md
